overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing characters walking through a long, narrow institutional corridor with concrete walls, fluorescent lighting, and fog visible through side windows. The camera follows a character in a dark suit while another character in medical scrubs is briefly visible in the foreground before exiting the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: institutional corridor with foggy exterior views

events.description: foreground medical character exits frame to the right, camera continues following suited character

agents.ego_description: following a group of characters through a dimly lit concrete corridor, maintaining steady walking pace behind a medical professional

notable_agents.action: character in medical scrubs with blue surgical cap walking ahead and slightly to the right
character in dark business suit walking steadily down the corridor ahead

entered.detail: gray concrete wall with weathered texture and horizontal trim running along the side
dark horizontal beams spanning the corridor ceiling at regular intervals
long rectangular fluorescent tube mounted on the ceiling providing artificial illumination
large rectangular window showing dense fog or mist outside, limiting visibility
light-colored square floor tiles covering the corridor walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed institutional corridor with concrete walls and a tiled floor. Fluorescent lights illuminate the space as the camera follows two characters from behind: a medical professional in scrubs with a blue cap visible in the foreground, and a suited figure walking ahead. Fog is visible through windows on the left side, creating a hazy atmosphere. The medical character moves toward the right and exits the frame as the segment ends.

events.description: distant human figure becomes visible standing at the end of the corridor ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor following the suited character, approaching a distant stationary figure

notable_agents.action: character in dark business suit maintaining steady walking pace down the corridor center
stationary figure standing in the corridor ahead, visible in the distance

entered.detail: opening or intersection at the end of the corridor where the distant figure stands

segments.scene_description: With the medical character no longer in view, the camera continues following the suited character deeper into the corridor. The architecture remains consistent with concrete walls, ceiling beams, and fluorescent lighting. Around the 15-second mark, a distant stationary figure becomes visible at the corridor's end. The foggy exterior remains visible through the side windows as the camera approaches the corridor junction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile institutional corridor that transitions from a shared walk to a solitary approach toward a distant figure. It begins by following two characters from behind, with a medical professional in scrubs and a blue cap occupying the foreground as they move past concrete walls and fluorescent lights. As the medical professional veers to the right and exits the frame, the camera maintains its focus on the suited figure walking deeper into the hazy environment. The scene then expands as the camera advances past ceiling beams and windows overlooking a thick fog, gradually revealing a stationary figure waiting at the far end of the hallway. The movement finally culminates as the camera closes the distance toward the corridor junction and the mysterious silhouette ahead.
